channel.title: The Wandering Lantern — Upcoming Events
channel.description: Upcoming events at The Wandering Lantern, a children's bookstore in Lakewood, OH.

item.title: Postcard Pen Pals
item.description:
March 12, 2026 · 6:00 PM - 7:00 PM · Ages: All ages

Design, color, and create a stack of one-of-a-kind postcards, then get matched with your very own pen pal to keep the letters going! A crafting and writing event for all ages. $12 per person.

Learn more & register →

item.title: Family Classics Book Club
item.description:
March 17, 2026 · 6:00 PM - 7:00 PM · Ages: 6-12

Join us this month for 'Pollyanna' by Eleanor H. Porter — a timeless story of optimism and joy that parents and kids can enjoy together.

Learn more & register →

item.title: Meet Matthew Swinehart & Nola the Noble Corgi!
item.description:
March 21, 2026 · 11:00 AM & 11:30 AM · Ages: All ages

The book comes out March 10th — Nola arrives March 21st. Celebrate the brand-new release with author Matthew Swinehart and the real Nola, a certified therapy dog whose job is visiting hospital patients to bring them comfort and calm.

Learn more & register →

item.title: Once Upon a Dime
item.description:
April 2, 2026 · During Store Hours · Ages: All ages

Celebrate Children's Book Day with us! Select books priced at just 10 cents — only on Thursday, April 2nd.

Learn more & register →

item.title: Cardboard Maker's Space
item.description:
April 3, 2026 · 6:00 PM - 8:00 PM · Ages: 10+

A night of creativity and invention! Design a robot, build an architectural structure, or create a piece of art — all out of cardboard. $12 per child.

Learn more & register →

item.title: Meet Charlotte the Perching Detective!
item.description:
April 11, 2026 · 11:00 AM · Ages: All ages

Charlotte the golden Cocker Spaniel is a trained detective — and she's coming to prove it. Kids hide the scent tins, she finds them every time. Author Kristine Sheppard will be here to read the book that started it all.

Learn more & register →

item.title: Layered Paper Art Workshop
item.description:
April 11, 2026 · 3:00 PM - 6:00 PM · Ages: 12+

Create a stunning layered paper art shadow box that tells the story of your choice. A creative workshop for teens ages 12+. $12 per person.

Learn more & register →

item.title: Storytime with Kellie DuBay Gillis
item.description:
April 18, 2026 · 11:00 AM · Ages: All ages

A Fairview Park scientist who writes picture books. Two nature stories. Two days before Earth Day. Kellie DuBay Gillis is your neighbor — and she's coming to story time.

Learn more & register →

item.title: Family Classics Book Club
item.description:
April 21, 2026 · 6:00 PM - 7:00 PM · Ages: 6-12

Join us this month for 'Winnie the Pooh' by A.A. Milne.

Learn more & register →

item.title: Family Classics Book Club
item.description:
May 19, 2026 · 6:00 PM - 7:00 PM · Ages: 6-12

Join us this month for 'The Secret Garden' by Frances Hodgson Burnett.

Learn more & register →

item.title: Family Classics Book Club
item.description:
June 16, 2026 · 6:00 PM - 7:00 PM · Ages: 6-12

Join us this month for 'The Wind in the Willows' by Kenneth Grahame.

Learn more & register →
